remediationScope.linkageExpectation: S02 bounded baselineSource rows must match S01 section ids and bounded counts.
remediationScope.dispositionExpectation: R131 must be explicit and not inferred from token-first evidence.

r131Disposition.followUp: Track private specialist lane ownership in a dedicated follow-up outside M073 token-efficiency validation.
r131Disposition.rationale: M073 proves token-budget behavior and safe visible projection, not private specialist lane ownership.
r131Disposition.nonCompletionWording: R131 is not complete in M073; it is formally rescoped to a bounded specialist-lane follow-up.

negativeCoverage.description: A S02 baselineSource sourceId that does not match any S01 section row fails linkage.
A S02 baselineSource bounded token count that differs from S01 fails linkage.
A disposition without owner or follow-up fails explicit disposition.
A disposition that claims R131 is done without bounded specialist evidence fails explicit disposition.
A fixture containing raw payload field names or secret-like values fails redaction.
